limitations: Generic orchestration only — domain data via provider loaders.
Read tools only in Companion runtime.
Metadata-only memory — no raw chat transcripts.
Level 4 critical actions prohibited for Aipify.
Business+ plan gate for desktop pairing.

limitations: Mobile client not shipped — specification only.
entries.next_required_step: Ship mobile thin client consuming same Core bundle.

limitations: Uses community best-practice moderation_status metadata — not full verification queue.
No document images, ID data, or sensitive profile fields exposed to Companion.
entries.next_required_step: Connect dedicated verification_queue.read source when community verification RPC is approved.

limitations: verification.request requires explicit approval — no auto-approve.
Privacy-sensitive verification metadata only.
entries.next_required_step: Wire verification queue pending counts to Command Brief when live adapter exists.

limitations: Queue summary uses community metadata proxy until dedicated verification queue RPC is approved.
No document images, ID numbers, or moderator notes exposed to Companion.
entries.next_required_step: Connect dedicated read-only verification queue RPC and promote Command Brief to exact semantic match.

limitations: Case lookup uses metadata-only proxy records with masked subject references.
No identity documents or sensitive profile fields.
entries.next_required_step: Wire dedicated verification case RPC with audit-only metadata fields.

limitations: No reversible verification_review.create registered — verification.request exists instead.
entries.next_required_step: Register reversible review action only if existing Trust Center RPC supports it.

limitations: Read bundle uses appointment center metadata — adapter_available false until authenticated E2E.
No invented availability slots — partial proxy only.
entries.next_required_step: Connect live booking write RPC with availability recheck and idempotent create.

limitations: Generic Services/Appointment provider — no salon-specific Core logic.
Double-booking prevention depends on industry pack loader flags.
entries.next_required_step: Provider adapter for natural-language booking with employee match and buffer enforcement.

limitations: Employee.read mapped via resource/staff capabilities — not standalone adapter.
entries.next_required_step: Wire employee.read capability alias in services provider manifest.

limitations: vacation_mode.read and post_vacation_availability.read registered in services manifest — Phase 36.
Post-vacation availability uses integration metadata, not computed slots.
entries.next_required_step: Wire exact Command Brief signals when live absence integration reports return dates.

limitations: Write proposals require explicit confirmation — no auto-book.
No live booking.create/update/cancel RPC connected in Phase 36 V1.
entries.next_required_step: Ship reversible booking write RPC with availability recheck and idempotency before enabling writes.

limitations: Only exact_live and compatible_live domain signals are displayed.
Partial proxy and source_missing signals are excluded from live Command Brief events.
entries.next_required_step: Connect hosts and support domain signal arrays when live adapters ship.

limitations: HR, warehouse, finance, sales, security, community, support, and hosts inline signal builders connected.
Partial proxy signals excluded until dedicated exact sources ship.
entries.next_required_step: Wire booking read bundle into services context for live appointment signals.

limitations: Queue counts from ASO dashboard — assignment and SLA fields are partial.
No production_ready without authenticated APP E2E against live support source.
entries.next_required_step: Connect dedicated SLA and assignment fields when provider exposes them.

limitations: Case metadata only — private messages and internal notes excluded.
entries.next_required_step: Wire Support AI case lookup merge when organization scope aligns.

limitations: Draft-only — support_response.send and auto-close are blocked.
Grounded sources required — Aipify never auto-sends to customers.
entries.next_required_step: Connect live draft RPC with explicit approval gate before send path.

limitations: Write RPCs exist but Companion runtime adapter is not connected — execution_source_missing.
entries.next_required_step: Enable reversible assign/escalate adapter with user confirmation and audit.

limitations: Only exact_live ASO queue signals appear in Command Brief.
Partial SLA proxy signals excluded until dedicated SLA source ships.
entries.next_required_step: Deduplicate support signals against proactive loader when both report same case.

limitations: Property metadata from Property Center — no external channel fields in Core.
No production_ready without authenticated APP E2E against live Hosts source.
entries.next_required_step: Connect calendar occupancy merge when live occupancy RPC is exact.

limitations: Guest references masked — full contact requires explicit permission.
entries.next_required_step: Wire guest directory lookup with audit when permission granted.

limitations: Operations boards are partial metadata — no private guest messages.
entries.next_required_step: Expose property readiness as exact signal when board fields stabilize.

limitations: Forecast is expected income — never presented as booked revenue.
Reuses Finance Core contracts — no parallel Hosts finance engine.
entries.next_required_step: Connect reconciliation exact source when provider exposes live status.

limitations: Draft-only — guest_response.send and auto-send are blocked.
No message sent without provider confirmation.
entries.next_required_step: Connect live draft RPC with explicit approval gate before any send path.

limitations: Write RPC exists but Companion runtime adapter is not connected — execution_source_missing.
entries.next_required_step: Enable reversible task assign/create adapter with user confirmation and audit.

limitations: Only exact/compatible live Hosts V1 sources appear in Command Brief.
Partial proxy and source_missing signals excluded.
entries.next_required_step: Deduplicate hosts signals against finance and proactive loaders.

limitations: Parked V2 centers (Smart Scheduling, Inventory, Insurance, Vendor Marketplace, Enterprise Portfolio) are registered only — not built in Phase 39.
entries.next_required_step: Do not implement parked Hosts V2 phases until explicitly approved.

limitations: Generic Core contracts only — provider adapters supply live records.
entries.next_required_step: Connect provider adapters per relationship type with audit logging.

limitations: No member list exposed in Phase 33C — contract only.
No raw email/phone — masked fields require explicit permission when source exists.
entries.next_required_step: Connect read-only community member directory search RPC with masked contact fields and audit logging.

limitations: APP organization members via get_employee_directory — team enrichment partial.
No employee write-actions in Companion runtime.
Platform Admin has no default cross-tenant employee lookup.
entries.next_required_step: Authenticated live APP E2E before production_ready_candidate.

limitations: HR pack employee directory remains separate from APP employee provider.
Use app_employee_directory for APP organization members.
entries.next_required_step: Connect HR pack adapter only when HR workforce source is required.

limitations: Customer records from relationship center — platform owns customer, partner attribution is metadata only.
No CRM write-actions in Companion runtime.
entries.next_required_step: Authenticated live APP E2E before production_ready_candidate.

limitations: Leads and prospects are distinct from converted customers — no auto-merge.
entries.next_required_step: Wire live lead follow-up signals with sales pipeline E2E.

limitations: Contacts linked to customer organizations — masked contact by default.
entries.next_required_step: Expand contact-company relationship reads with explicit permission gates.

limitations: Business customer organizations with organization_number when available.
Partner attribution on opportunities — not customer ownership.
entries.next_required_step: Connect revenue pipeline opportunity enrichment when sales entitlement active.

limitations: Canonical org suppliers from procurement operations — not marketplace candidates.
Supplier write-actions disabled in Companion runtime.
entries.next_required_step: Authenticated live APP E2E before production_ready_candidate.

limitations: Vendor aliases map to supplier organizations — distinct from Aipify Partners.
entries.next_required_step: Wire inventory integration links as enrichment only.

limitations: Supplier contacts are not APP employees or customers.
entries.next_required_step: Expand contact-company mapping with explicit permission gates.

limitations: Manufacturer classification inferred from category_key/services.
entries.next_required_step: Document explicit manufacturer subtype when procurement schema adds it.

limitations: Distributor classification inferred from category_key/services.
entries.next_required_step: Document explicit distributor subtype when procurement schema adds it.

limitations: Subcontractor classification inferred from services metadata.
entries.next_required_step: Separate subcontractor registry only if procurement adds explicit type.

limitations: Executive oversight only — no customer operational data.
Companion wiring partial on super routes.
entries.next_required_step: Link super-admin aggregate RPCs to read-only Companion governance context.

limitations: Aggregates only — never customer operational records in Companion.
entries.next_required_step: Wire verified provider registry to platform Companion knowledge surface.

limitations: Attribution only — partners do not own customers.
entries.next_required_step: Connect partner growth metrics to read-only Companion briefing.

limitations: Primary Companion surface — tenant-scoped only.

packages.exact_gap: No authenticated live APP E2E gate for production_ready_candidate promotion.
packages.required_work: Ship repeatable authenticated APP session E2E harness covering directory, support, and hosts read paths.
security_considerations: Tenant isolation and permission denial must be exercised in live E2E.
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated APP session runs against staging or pilot tenant.
Directory, support, and hosts read orchestrators return tenant-scoped outcomes.
No production_ready without passing live E2E batch.
packages.why_p1: Blocks honest production_ready_candidate for Phase 38–42 modules and pilot/demo credibility.

packages.exact_gap: APP employee directory connected_but_partial — missing live E2E certification.
packages.required_work: Complete authenticated E2E and team/department enrichment from organization management RPC.
security_considerations: Mask contact fields without directory.search.contact permission.
acceptance_criteria: Employee search by name, email, role returns exact tenant-scoped matches.
Cross-tenant and suspended APP cases fail closed.
Readiness may advance to production_ready_candidate after E2E pass.
packages.why_p1: Central organization directory — live source already wired in Phase 40.

packages.exact_gap: CRM customer directory partial — pipeline/opportunity enrichment incomplete.
packages.required_work: Document and wire remaining CRM fields; authenticated E2E for customer, lead, contact search.
security_considerations: Partner attribution is metadata — never customer ownership.
acceptance_criteria: Customer, lead, contact, and organization searches pass Phase 41 regression under live session.
No CRM write-actions enabled in Companion.
packages.why_p1: High commercial value — sales/CRM directory is pilot-critical.

packages.exact_gap: Supplier directory partial — procurement vendor fields and E2E incomplete.
packages.required_work: Enrich assigned buyer and performance fields when RPC exposes them; live E2E certification.
security_considerations: Never expose bank or contract body in directory search.
acceptance_criteria: Supplier search by company, org number, category works under live APP session.
Marketplace candidates excluded from active supplier results.
packages.why_p1: Procurement source is exact live — close partial gaps before new modules.

packages.exact_gap: Support queue uses ASO aggregates — SLA and assignment fields are partial/proxy.
packages.required_work: Connect dedicated SLA and assignment fields when ASO RPC exposes exact values.
security_considerations: No private message content in queue metadata.
acceptance_criteria: SLA breach signals use source_exact fields only.
Partial proxy counts excluded from Command Brief exact signals.
packages.why_p1: Support queue is pilot-facing — partial SLA misrepresents operational truth.

packages.exact_gap: assign/escalate RPCs exist — Companion write adapter not connected.
packages.required_work: Enable reversible assign/escalate adapter with user confirmation and audit.
security_considerations: All writes require explicit approval — no auto-assign.
acceptance_criteria: Draft proposal flow returns approval_required outcome.
Executed writes audit without raw case content.
packages.why_p1: Write RPCs exist — adapter gap blocks safe support actions.

packages.required_work: Connect reversible Hosts task write adapter with confirmation.
security_considerations: No guest PII in task write payloads.
acceptance_criteria: Task write proposals require approval.
No production_ready until reversible write path is proven.
packages.why_p1: Hosts operations read is live — write is the next safe execution step.

packages.exact_gap: Verification queue exact read source not fully connected.
packages.required_work: Connect read-only verification queue with metadata-only audit fields.
security_considerations: No document images, ID numbers, or sensitive profile fields.
acceptance_criteria: verification_status.read uses source_exact or source_compatible only.
Command Brief signals exclude partial proxy verification counts.
packages.why_p1: Trust verification is security-sensitive — partial sources risk false confidence.

packages.exact_gap: Community member directory has contract only — no live searchable member source.
packages.required_work: Approve and connect tenant-scoped member search source with masking and audit.
security_considerations: Community member PII masked by default.
acceptance_criteria: Member search returns tenant-scoped masked records.
No member list without explicit entitlement.
packages.why_p1: Community member directory needs honest source connection — currently source_missing.

packages.exact_gap: Booking write RPC not connected — proposals only.
packages.required_work: Ship reversible booking create/update/cancel RPC with availability recheck.
acceptance_criteria: booking.create returns proposal until user confirms.
Availability recheck runs before commit.
packages.why_p1: Services read is partial — write blocks appointment completion loop.
